default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss SEO content strategy engagement and align on goals, processes, and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX demonstrated initial keyword research and content opportunity analysis, identifying 380 potential topics with 2M monthly searches](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Ramp aims to close a 20,000 monthly user traffic deficit and scale content production while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [GrowthX will provide a dedicated managing editor and team of specialized editors to handle end-to-end content production, including staging and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Collaboration opportunities with non-competing SMB-focused companies like Reddit and Homebase were proposed for cross-linking and domain authority boost](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2678.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Initial Analysis and Workflow Demo

  - [Analyzed 380 content opportunities based on competitor keyword gaps](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Created scoring framework to assess topic relevance to Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Demonstrated content ideation and creation workflow using AI and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Proposed memory search functionality to identify related content across Ramp's site](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)

### Ramp's Goals and Metrics

  - [Close 20,000 monthly user traffic deficit](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Increase qualified traffic and email submissions](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2270.0)
  - [Improve average keyword rankings in target pillars](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2387.0)
  - [Implement AI workflows for team efficiency (aim for weekly usage by all team members)](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2406.0)

### Ramp's Current Content Strategy

  - [Content pillars aligned with product categories (e.g., business credit cards, expense management)](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2893.0)
  - [Prioritization based on traffic opportunity and ranking potential](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2979.0)
  - [Mix of optimizing existing content and creating new content](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2893.0)
  - [Utilize insights from paid search team and product management](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=3059.0)

### Content Production Process

  - [Multiple methods: freelance writers, in-house creation, Gushwork AI, contributor network](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=3295.0)
  - [In-house editors review and publish content](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=3339.0)
  - [Pain point: limited editing resources for formatting and staging content](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=3364.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Process

  - [Dedicated managing editor responsible for end-to-end content production](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Team of 16 specialized editors to augment managing editor's work](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Handle all staging, publishing, and scheduling tasks](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Aim to remove manual work from Ramp team unless specific review is required](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

### Target Audience and Information Sources

  - [SMB finance professionals (e.g., controllers, finance managers, CFOs)](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
  - [Founders of small, successful companies](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2661.0)
  - [Key sources: Accounting Today, LinkedIn, CFO.com, CFO Dive, Forbes contributor network](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send follow-up with onboarding checklist and request for additional documentation](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [Coordinate regular weekly sync meetings](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [Ramp to provide access to necessary tools and data sources](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin implementing content production workflows and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [Explore potential collaborations with Reddit and Homebase for cross-linking opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/9w4wxD2GxrsPC4pe-c42NLNhQLt4qQXG?tab=summary&timestamp=2678.0)

action_items.description: Provide existing content samples that represent ideal 'RAMP voice' for growthX to model workflows after
Provide paid keywords list to growthX
Share all relevant access (Notion, reporting tools, and reporting access) with growthX team
